title: Emit redacted Grabowski routing outcomes
goal: Add an explicit, opt-in Grabowski producer that derives redacted operator routing outcomes from execution/friction receipts, validates the Heimlern payload and Chronik envelope contracts, and can append them without changing routing policy.

acceptance.assertion: The producer derives bounded route, outcome, reward, friction and evidence fields from typed execution receipts; missing evidence yields a typed refusal rather than invented values.
Every output validates against the pinned Heimlern payload contract and the merged Chronik transport envelope with deterministic payload/event digests.
Raw logs, command output, secrets, private absolute paths and unbounded free text are excluded or rejected before append.
Production append is explicit and opt-in; dry-run/fixture validation is the default and duplicate event ids are idempotent.
The producer cannot apply Heimlern proposals, change route weights, dispatch tasks or weaken Grabowski execution gates.
Focused tests cover success, missing evidence, digest drift, redaction, duplicate append and transport failure; any live proof occurs only after reviewed deployment and remains non-applying.

metadata.reason_separate_task: A fixture-equivalent Heimlern smoke cannot establish a real source producer or runtime append path.
